features.title: Feature Flag Management
features.description: List, inspect, create, update, kill, archive, and restore flags across any workspace

features.title: Rule-Based Segments
features.description: Full lifecycle management of rule-based segments and their environment definitions

features.title: Rollout Statuses
features.description: Discover and filter flags by rollout status (Pre-Production, Ramping, etc.)

features.title: Simple Authentication
features.description: Single API key, zero config friction

features.title: Multi-Workspace Support
features.description: Work across any number of Harness FME workspaces

features.title: Environment-Aware
features.description: Target flags in specific environments (staging, production, etc.)

features.title: Modern Stack
features.description: TypeScript 5+, ES2023, Native Fetch API, ESM

features.title: MCP Protocol
features.description: Native integration with Claude Desktop, Claude Code CLI, Cursor, and more

features.title: Safety Guards
features.description: Destructive operations require explicit confirm: true — no accidental kills or deletions

install:
# No installation needed — just use npx in your MCP config
npx --yes @kud/mcp-harness-fme@latest
